7GUIs Counter - Vue

Result

Source

Bundle sizes:
65.8 kB minfied
23.7 kB Gzip
21.5 kB Brotli
  • Counter.vue
  • index.js
<!--
	Since Vue replaces the element given in el,
	we redefine it here so tests work
-->
<template>
  <div id="app">
    <button
      class="btn badge"
      style="margin-top: .5rem"
      v-on:click="count += 1"
      v-bind:data-badge="count"
    >count: {{ count }}</button>
  </div>
</template>

<script>
export default {
  data() {
    return {
      count: 0
    };
  }
};
</script>
import Vue from "vue";
import Counter from "./Counter.vue";

new Vue({
	el: "#app",
	components: { Counter },
	render(createElement) {
		return createElement(Counter);
	}
});
